title: senecio pachyphyllos
intro: Senecio pachyphyllos, also known as Jerusalem sage, is a perennial herb in the family Asteraceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Senecio pachyphyllos include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and promote wound healing. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, and is often used in herbal remedies to treat a range of health issues.
